name: HDFC Diners Club BizBlack Credit Card

fees.waiverCondition: Spend ₹5,00,000 or more in the previous year

categoryRates.description: 5 Reward Points per ₹150 on all retail and business purchases (3.33% reward rate)
10X Reward Points via SmartBuy portal (~33% reward rate on flights, hotels, Amazon, Flipkart)

redemptionOptions: Airmiles (1 RP = 1 Airmile for InterMiles, KrisFlyer, Singapore Airlines)

loungeAccess.provider: Priority Pass & Diners Club Lounge Network

insurance.travelInsurance: Up to ₹50,00,000 emergency medical cover overseas
insurance.purchaseProtection: Up to ₹5,00,000 for 90 days from purchase

additionalBenefits: Unlimited domestic and international airport lounge access
Complimentary Priority Pass membership for primary and add-on cardholders
Designed for business expenses with higher credit limits
Detailed expense categorization for business accounting
Golf privileges at select courses across India
Supplementary cards for employees at no extra cost
pros: 33% reward rate via SmartBuy 10X is identical to the personal Diners Club Black
Unlimited lounge access worldwide for business travelers
Business expense tracking and detailed statements for accounting
Welcome vouchers of ₹10,000 fully offset the joining fee
1.99% forex markup is among the lowest for business credit cards
cons: Diners Club network acceptance is limited compared to Visa/Mastercard
Higher income requirement of ₹18L than personal Diners Black
No milestone benefits unlike the personal Diners Club Black card
10X SmartBuy cap of 25,000 points/month applies same as personal variant
idealFor: Business owners and self-employed professionals with high monthly spends
Frequent business travelers who need unlimited lounge access
Entrepreneurs who want top-tier rewards on business expenses

faqs.question: How is BizBlack different from the regular Diners Club Black?
faqs.answer: The BizBlack offers the same core reward structure (5 RP/₹150 base, 10X SmartBuy) but is designed for business use. It provides detailed expense categorization, higher credit limits, and supplementary cards for employees. However, it does not include the milestone benefits (₹15,000 annually) that the personal Diners Black offers.

faqs.question: Can I use this card for personal expenses too?
faqs.answer: While the card is designed for business spending, there is no restriction on using it for personal expenses. All spends earn Reward Points at the same rates regardless of the expense category.

faqs.question: Is the 10X SmartBuy reward available on the BizBlack?
faqs.answer: Yes, the 10X SmartBuy portal works identically to the personal Diners Club Black. You earn 50 RP per ₹150 on SmartBuy bookings (flights, hotels, Amazon, Flipkart), capped at 25,000 bonus points per month.

faqs.question: Do I need to be a business owner to apply?
faqs.answer: No, while the card is targeted at business professionals, self-employed individuals, freelancers, and salaried professionals with a minimum annual income of ₹18,00,000 can also apply.
